instruction: The code icon has two problems: it's been tinted red AND the canvas is clipping it (80x80). Restore both the color and the viewBox.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 80 80" width="80" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="80" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/code.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #e63946" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/code.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></g>
</svg>
